name: ingle-lang
description: Ingle language support: syntax highlighting plus diagnostics, hover, go-to-definition, completion, and document symbols via the in-tree inglec language server.

emberLsp.serverPath.description: Absolute path to the inglec binary (started with --lsp). Leave empty to use the default install location (~/.ingle/bin/inglec, where `make install` deploys it).

emberLsp.stdPath.description: Path to the Ingle standard library (passed as INGLE_STD). Leave empty to use the default install location (~/.ingle/std).
